title: nyldn/claude-octopus
summary: Surface AI blindspots before you ship. Put up to 8 AI models on every research, design or coding task.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: A memory-first AI agent that remembers why decisions were made — not just the last message. Runs local (Ollama), cloud (Claude · OpenAI · Gemini), or decentralized TEE. Graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model routing, sandboxed tools. MCP · ACP · A2A. One Rust binary.

title: jjhickman/garbanzo-bot
summary: Multi-platform AI community bot for Discord, WhatsApp, Telegram, Matrix, and more! Persistent community memory with semantic search, cross-platform bridging, and human-in-the-loop moderation. Works with any AI provider. Start with npx garbanzo-bot setup, or run the full stack on Docker Compose.

title: OgreScat/AgentGRIT
summary: Governance-first AI agent runtime — cost-first routing to the cheapest capable model, self-enforced bylaws, a trust ladder, and evidence before done. A framework, not a product: bring your own agents. FSL-1.1-MIT.

title: Miosa-osa/OSA
summary: An AI agent that lives on your computer and does the work you ask for, in plain words — from writing code to running your business busywork. Local, one command, any model.

title: KingsleyOWO/Semark
summary: Semark converts PDFs, Office files, HTML, and images into RAG-ready semantic Markdown using MinerU and VLM/LLM review, with chunks, source maps, and automatic document splitting.

title: sookoothaii/IntelShed
summary: Spatial intelligence workstation — OSINT feeds, fusion analytics, local and cloud AI briefing, optional Pi edge sync

title: thekaveh/atlas
summary: Atlas — self-hosted, source-configurable, multi-disciplinary engineering platform for gen-AI, ML, and data work. 30+ OSS Docker Compose services (Ollama, LiteLLM, Supabase, n8n, Airflow, Spark, Weaviate, Neo4j, JupyterHub, Ray, ComfyUI, …) pre-wired behind Kong. Interactive TUI wizard, configurable tracks, one-command launch.

title: Jewelzufo/granitepi-4-nano
summary: Run IBM Granite 4.0 locally on Raspberry Pi 5 with Ollama.This is a privacy-first AI. Your data never leaves your device because it runs 100% locally. There are no cloud uploads and no third-party tracking.

title: yuma-shintani/ollama-model-library
summary: Get Ollama models from the Ollama library website (https://ollama.com/library) in JSON format.

title: wpdlf/local-pdf-analyzer
summary: Local AI PDF summary & Q&A desktop app - fully offline with Ollama, or Claude/OpenAI. RAG semantic search, clickable page citations for hallucination checks, answer verification, Vision image analysis, scanned-PDF OCR, instant session restore. Electron + React.

title: shayeeboy/Enterprise-RAG-Assistant
summary: AI-Native Piano Learning RAG Assistant - live & free (GitHub Pages -> Google Cloud Run -> Neon pgvector -> Groq): ingestion + query pipeline (rewrite -> hybrid search/RRF -> rerank -> LLM) with citations, guardrails, and built-in observability (latency/tokens/cost) persisted to a searchable DB. Node.js, no paid APIs.
